examples: The sedimentary rocks are graywacke, siltstone, tuff andpellitie, etc.
The host rocks are mainly calcareous siltstone and silty slate.
The channel is overlain by siltstone and lenticular beds of limestone.
Working on their hands and knees, scientists soon traced the pieces back up the hilltop to a slab of red siltstone, where they so far have found 200 bones mingled with crushed eggshells.
